name: Malt Shop Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Ready Crust Graham Cracker, per recipe
1 pt (32 oz) Vanilla Ice Cream, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened ice cream and whipped topping in a bowl until well blended.
2. Reserve 8 whole Whoppers for garnish. Crush the remaining Whoppers.
3. Add 1 cup of crushed Whoppers to the ice cream mixture. Reserve the remaining 1/2 cup of crushed candy.
4. Spoon the ice cream mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Top with the reserved crushed candy and chilled Whoppers.
6. Freeze for 4 hours before serving.
7. To serve, garnish with whipped topping and top with 8 whole Whoppers.
